completed_steps.summary: Classified as multi-part with 3 parts (back / front / duel-server)
Inventoried existing docs: README.md, CLAUDE.md, _bmad-output/project-context.md, _bmad-output/planning-artifacts/* (PRDs, architectures, UX, epics, R&D)
Tech stack: Spring Boot 3.4.2 / Java 21 (back); Angular 19.1.3 / TS 5.5.4 (front); Node 24 / ocgcore-wasm / piscina (duel-server)
Conditional analysis via 3 parallel Explore subagents — REST endpoints, JPA entities, Flyway migrations, security, components, services, WS protocol, solver layout, data files
source-tree-analysis.md generated (annotated tree per part + critical paths)
development-guide.md + deployment-guide.md generated (prereqs, env vars, scripts, Docker stack, TLS, network tiers)
integration-architecture.md generated (component graph, network tiers, 7 integration points incl. shared ChainSnapshotTracker)
Validation: no _(To be generated)_ markers; project-context.md refreshed alongside

findings.project_classification: multi-part monorepo, 3 deployables; networks split into public (front), internal (front+back+duel-server), data-only (back+db)

technology_stack.back: Spring Boot 3.4.2 / Java 21 / PostgreSQL 16 / Flyway 11.2.0 / Spring Security + JWT
technology_stack.front: Angular 19.1.3 standalone / signals / OnPush / Material + CDK / ngx-translate FR default
technology_stack.duel-server: Node 24 / ocgcore-wasm sync mode / piscina pools / vitest / 4 createConfigurable<T> modules with boot invariant

feature_map.back: REST + JWT cookie auth + JPA + ygoprodeck.com sync + image storage + SSE + replay persistence + RoomCleanupScheduler
feature_map.front: deck mgmt + solo simulator + PvP duel UI + replay viewer + combo solver UI; AnimationOrchestratorService shared via AnimationDataSource
feature_map.duel-server: PvP runDuelLoop (worker thread) + replay precompute (Piscina) + solver pool (Piscina); ChainSnapshotTracker shared between live + replay for parity

verification_summary: Three Explore subagents enumerated source per part (back / front / duel-server). No source files were modified; only docs/ and _bmad-output/project-context.md were written. Documentation cross-checked against CLAUDE.md and existing project-context.md.
open_risks: RoomService:73 pessimistic lock around external HTTP call (potential deadlock)
message-filter.ts:213 Story 4.2 absolute→relative player index conversion pending
Flyway out-of-order=true tolerable on single-node only
Image path traversal possible in DocumentService if user-controlled URLs are ever introduced
No pagination on /cards/favorites/remove; payload grows with collection
Dual auth state (signal + BehaviorSubject) — unify post-audit
next_checks: Re-run /bmad-document-project after any major architectural change
Verify duelAssert / POLL-DROP REGRESSION watchdog is intact (CLAUDE.md regression fence)
